Enumeration Case# kUSBInformationDeviceIsCaptiveBit

Mac Catalyst 18.4+macOS 10.6+

```
kUSBInformationDeviceIsCaptiveBit = 0
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iokit/usbdeviceinformationbits/kusbinformationdeviceiscaptivebit#discussion)

The USB device is directly attached to its hub and cannot be removed.
